lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Odd. You don't seem to have a whistle I can recharge.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Doesn't look like you've got anything I can feed to the birds here. You'll want to get some of the raw meats that the hunters bring back with them.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: There you go. Some whistle charges for you!

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Kuani! Someone's come to visit the birds!

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: I've spotted you working hard to help the guild. How would you like a basic quetzal whistle blueprint to help you get back here in the future?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd love one!

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: You'll need to use the blueprint to craft a whistle from a willow log. Make sure it works for you. There's no standard size whistle nowadays.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: When you want to charge your whistle, be sure to bring some of those lovely meats you're gathering up here for the birds. If they eat well you'll get a lot more use out of them!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: I'm Pitri, though most of the others call me birdbrain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On account of the...?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: The birds, yes. I just feel so at home amongst them... Though I am more partial to cooked food than the raw stuff they get.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teach me about the birds?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Absolutely! Like many in Varlamore, we here at the guild use quetzals to help us move people and reports throughout the entire network of transport nodes.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: We also have these handy quetzal whistles that allow us to call for one to take us back to the guild. They're pretty magical and work at very long ranges.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I get my hands on one of those whistles?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Once you've become more settled in with us at the guild, absolutely.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Sure! I have a blueprint set aside for you to grab when you're ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how do you motivate the birds?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Food, mostly. They're big fans of the raw meats that the hunters bring back with them. I'm worried they may be waiting to eat us, quite honestly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, they're certainly big enough to try.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you recharge my whistle?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Doesn't look like you've got anything I can feed to the birds here. You'll want to get some of the raw meats that the hunters bring back with them.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Sure thing!

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Looks like the birds are all full for now. Make them work a bit before feeding them again!

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: There you go. Some whistle charges for you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get my hands on more whistles?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: I can produce another blueprint for you, for a small cost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of small cost?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: 500 coins. These blueprints are my art, and before you say anything, 'exposure' is the last thing I want out here in the savannah.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Here you go, one whistle blueprint.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost my perfected whistle. Do you have any spares?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Someone found one just the other day and gave it to me in case someone came to claim it. Could it be yours?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's possible? Can I see it?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That notch in the tail, that scratch on the underside... Yes, it's mine! I can't believe it!

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Here you go! I'm afraid it has no charges left, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get a whistle with unlimited charges?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: I see you already have a Perfected quetzal whistle, I can upgrade it for you at a cost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much is this going to set me back.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: I don't want your coins. Instead, I would like 10,000 charges worth of food for the birds here. You can give that to me piece by piece as well if need be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds good to me, I have some food for the birds right here.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Thanks for the feed, you still need to give me another [number] charges worth of food for the birds.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Thanks for all the food, I'll be glad to give you a whistle with infinite charges. The first one is free of course, any more will cost you though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some more food for the birds.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Thanks for all the food, I'll be glad to give you a whistle with infinite charges. The first one is free of course, any more will cost you though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I get another Perfected quetzal whistle with unlimited charges?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: I can produce another whistle for you, for a moderate cost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of moderate cost?

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: 50,000 coins. These whistles are my art and not that easy to make. Plus a small fee for the charges.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I can't afford one right now. I'll pop back later.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Here you go, one Perfected quetzal whistle with unlimited charges.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better be off.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Thanks [player name]!

lines.speaker: Soar Leader Pitri
lines.text: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
